arts.ttl: ‘Controversial negotiation’ sends player to Everton – Agent kept in dark, manager chat crucial for Toffees
arts.sum: Charly Alcaraz was unaware of Everton’s negotiations with Flamengo for him and had initially intended to stay with the Brazilian club. That’s according to UOL and journalist Raisa Simplicio, who both report on the matter today and the fact Alcaraz had not intended to return to England. arts.ttl: Four Leicester City players with uncertain futures ahead of transfer deadline day
arts.sum: After making his Premier League debut at the end of September, Alves had suggested he wanted a loan spell away from City to get a regular run of senior minutes. The winter window is in its final few days and Leicester City are still working to bring in new signings to boost the club’s Premier League survival hopes.

arts.ttl: Everton 'reach agreement' for Alcaraz loan deal
arts.sum: Everton have "reached an agreement" to sign midfielder Carlos Alcaraz on a loan deal from Flamengo, according to the Brazilian club.

arts.ttl: Everton have been in negotiations ‘for months’ to sign player – Unlikely this widow, but one to keep eye on
arts.sum: Everton have been in negotiations ‘for months’ over Eintracht Frankfurt’s Junior Dina Ebimbe, although a move this month is unlikely. That’s according to BILD, who report on the player as he heads back to the German club after failing a medical at Monaco. arts.ttl: Everton transfer agreement quickly wrapped up on Thursday – Easy clauses make permanent move likely
arts.sum: Everton will be obligated to buy Charly Alcaraz from Flamengo when a loan deal for him ends in the summer. That’s according to Meiahora, who report that Alcaraz will leave Flamengo for Everton in the coming days. arts.ttl: David Moyes had no remorse after touchline bust-up as Everton sent transfer reminder
